data.title: Tesla Expelled From Vancouver Auto Show Amid Security Concerns After Failing To 'Voluntarily Withdraw'
data.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) has been expelled from the Vancouver International Auto Show by authorities due to safety concerns.

data.title: Pebble Founder Echoes Mark Zuckerberg's Concerns, Slams Apple For Making It 'Nearly Impossible' To Build Smartwatches That Work With iPhone
data.description: Eric Migicovsky, the creator of the original Pebble smartwatch, has said Apple Inc.'s (NASDAQ:AAPL) iOS restrictions

data.title: Jamie Dimon Says 'There's A Lot Of Turbulence Out There' Amid Trump Tariffs, Inflation Woes And Geopolitical Risks
data.description: Jamie Dimon, CEO of JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM), expressed his views on the current economic landscape, highlighting concerns over geopolitical tensions and potential tariff impacts.

data.title: Tesla Owners Call On Elon Musk For Advanced Security Features Amid Rising Vandalism: 'There Definitely Is Fear Right Now'
data.description: In the wake of escalating vandalism incidents, Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) owners are calling on CEO Elon Musk to implement enhanced security features.
